description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with two stages: test and package. Add a test-linux job in the test stage (tagged linux) that runs after_script commands cd $CI_PROJECT_DIR, sudo rm -rf hydra/server/build, sudo rm -rf hydra/server/hydra_server.egg-info and then executes script commands python3 -m project_cleaner -t, cd hydra/server/, sudo pip install --break-system-packages ., sudo rm -rf build hydra_server.egg-info, cd $CI_PROJECT_DIR, test -f /tmp/.X99-lock || Xvfb :99, export DISPLAY=:99, export PATH=/usr/lib/postgresql/13/bin:$PATH, python3 -m venv --system-site-packages venv, venv/bin/pip install -r hydra/requirements.txt, venv/bin/pip install pytest==8.4.0, venv/bin/python -m pytest -v --terrain-in-tmp tests/. Add a test-windows job in the test stage (tagged hyd-app-v3) that runs the listed Windows batch commands: CHCP 65001, set PYTHONPATH=, set PYTHONHOME=, cd hydra\server\, C:\PROGRA~1\hydra\languagepack\v1\Python-3.7\python.exe -m pip install ., call "%ProgramFiles%\QGIS 3.28.15\bin\o4w_env.bat", set PATH=%OSGEO4W_ROOT%\apps\Qt5\bin;%OSGEO4W_ROOT%\apps\qgis-ltr\bin;"C:\Program Files\7-Zip";%PATH%, set PYTHONPATH=%USERPROFILE%\AppData\Roaming\QGIS\QGIS3\profiles\default;%CI_PROJECT_DIR%;%OSGEO4W_ROOT%\apps\qgis-ltr\python\plugins;%OSGEO4W_ROOT%\apps\qgis-ltr\python;%PYTHONPATH%, set QT_PLUGIN_PATH=%OSGEO4W_ROOT%\apps\Qt5\plugins, set PGSERVICEFILE=%USERPROFILE%\.pg_service.conf, rmdir /s /q %APPDATA%\Python\Python39\site-packages, pip install --force-reinstall ., cd ..\.., pip install -r hydra/requirements.txt, pip install pytest==8.4.0, python -W ignore::DeprecationWarning -m pytest -v tests. Finally, add a package-plugin job in the package stage that runs echo plugin > hydra/build.txt, echo     branch/tag:$CI_COMMIT_REF_NAME >> hydra/build.txt, echo     commit:$CI_COMMIT_SHORT_SHA >> hydra/build.txt, python release.py --ensure-version, python release.py --qgis-xml, python release.py --archive and publishes the artifacts hydra.zip, project_cleaner.py, and hydra.xml.
